overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking along a winding dirt trail through a sunny spring countryside. The journey progresses from dense flowering woodland through open meadows with wooden rural structures, showcasing vibrant natural scenery.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with flowering trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow dirt path surrounded by dense green foliage and white flowering trees

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the forest
trees with white blossoms lining the path
thick green bushes and trees surrounding the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by dense forest vegetation and white flowering trees. The canopy creates dappled lighting on the path as the character moves steadily forward through the secluded woodland area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside trail with grassy hills

events.description: trail emerges from dense forest into open countryside with visible sky and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the landscape opens up to reveal grassy hills and distant views

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence posts lining the right side of the path
grassy slope rising alongside the trail
mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide, sunlit countryside with grassy hills rising on the right and distant mountains visible ahead. Wooden fence posts begin to appear along the right side as the dense forest gives way to more open terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path with wooden structures and cultivated plants

events.description: passing a rustic wooden hut on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking past a wooden rural hut and tall sunflowers while maintaining a steady pace along the trail

entered.detail: small rustic wooden structure with shingled roof
tall sunflowers growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The trail passes a rustic wooden hut on the left while tall sunflowers line the right side of the path. The environment suggests a rural settlement area with maintained structures amidst the natural landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow trail with distant forest boundary

events.description: leaving the wooden hut behind and entering open meadow grassland

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path through open grassland toward a distant tree line

entered.detail: dense line of trees marking the horizon ahead
tall grass and wildflowers in open field

segments.scene_description: The path continues through open meadow grassland with the wooden hut now behind. White flowering trees return to the left side as the trail stretches toward a distant forest boundary under the bright blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a secluded, flowering woodland gradually opens into a wide, sunlit countryside. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by dense forest vegetation and white flowering trees, where the canopy casts dappled lighting across the path. As the character moves steadily forward, the dense woodland begins to thin, allowing the environment to expand. The scene then shifts into an open landscape of grassy hills and distant mountains, with wooden fence posts appearing along the right side of the trail as the forest gives way to the bright, open terrain.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt trail that transitions from a settled homestead into an open, flowering meadow. It begins by passing a rustic wooden hut on the left, while tall sunflowers line the right side of the path. As the camera moves forward, the hut recedes into the distance and the landscape opens up into expansive grassland. The scene then shifts as white flowering trees reappear on the left, guiding the path toward a distant forest boundary under a bright blue sky.
